======= RMA03125Cornell University Chorus records14-20-3125Compiled by Amy ZieglerDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Mar. 28, 20022B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:06:40 UTC.ENG12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)2007-05-29
converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Chorus records
Cornell University. Chorus
14-20-3125
4.4 cubic feet. 4.4 cubic feet.
1917-2016. Correspondence, photographs, cassette tapes, broadsides, programs, video tapes, awards. Correspondence, sound and video recordings, miscellany documenting the Cornell University Chorus. Collection material in English 4000187
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Amy Ziegler
Date completed:
Apr. 2001
EAD encoding:
J. Parker, Mar. 28, 2002
Date modified:
Jude Corina, May 2017
Cite As:
Cornell University Chorus records, #14-20-3125. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Scope and content
Collection includes correspondence, photographs, cassette tapes, broadsides and posters, programs, newsletters, video tapes, and awards of the Cornell University Chorus.
Photographs. Videotapes. Broadsides. Programs (documents) Singers. Music. Concert programs -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. Choirs. Cornell University -- : Students.

Scope and Contents
Includes 1917 group photograph, New York State Legislative Resolution signed by Steven M. Boggess, commending the Chorus on the occasion of its Sun-Kissed Tour.NewslettersNewsletters1980-1996217Newsletter Rewrites/Alternative Texts and Newsletter Articlesn.d.218Newsletters1992-2002517Notes Spring 2001-Fall 2007 [scattered issues]2001-2007521Membership and alumni correspondenceAlumni Correspondence: Alumnae Lists, Notes, Cards, Postcardsn.d.214Alumnae Letters1979-80214Alumni Correspondence1981-8232Alumni address information1980519Alumni address information1994520Sokol's Intro Letter and Model Thank-you letter to alumni1987216Attendance Rosters1980s-1990s216Attendance Roster copies1995216Daily Log1985-893Chorus Attendance Booksn.d.3Membership Surveys1996419Chorus Bios (photos)1999-2005524Cornell Chorus Attendance policyn.d.216Misc.
